Defines application IDs and a list of app registry entries for system apps in the Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[system_app_ids.auto.h](system_app_ids.auto.h.md)**: Defines application IDs for various system apps in the Pebble firmware.
- **[system_app_registry_list.auto.h](system_app_registry_list.auto.h.md)**: Defines a list of app registry entries for system and resource apps in the Pebble firmware.
